vibe: Precise, professional, technical but approachable. Emphasizes authority, clarity, and truth in design and cost calculation. High contrast layout bridging creative agency aesthetics and CAD structural integrity.

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight leading-tight font-semibold

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Tailwind standard (p-1 to p-32), emphasis on generous spacing for non-canvas areas. Modals and large cards use p-8 to p-12.
layout_and_spacing.bento_grid: For dashboard: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with gap-6. Use exact span ratios for widgets.
layout_and_spacing.app_layout: Full viewport height (h-screen) with a top navbar (h-14). Left sidebar for tools (w-16 or w-64), Right sidebar for properties/costs (w-80). Central area is the infinite canvas. Sidebars have sharp 1px borders (border-r, border-l).
layout_and_spacing.radii: Rounded-none to rounded-md (max 6px). Emphasize sharp, technical edges.

components.buttons: Flat, sharp corners (rounded-sm), strong contrast. Primary buttons use background #0A0A0A, hover #171717. Secondary buttons use transparent background, 1px border, text main.
components.cards: Cardless style preferred or 1px border (#D4D4D8) with pure white background, no shadow unless hovering.
components.inputs: Shadcn defaults but sharp corners, 1px solid border, focus ring 2px #2563EB. No rounded heavy borders.
components.tables: Dense, monospace font for numbers (JetBrains Mono). Right align monetary values. 1px bottom borders for rows, no vertical dividers.
components.modals: Glassmorphism disabled for data integrity. Solid white background, sharp border, heavy drop-shadow-2xl.

interactions_and_motion.hover: Subtle translations (-translate-y-0.5) on cards, crisp background color changes on buttons.
interactions_and_motion.transitions: transition-transform duration-200 ease-in-out, transition-opacity duration-200 ease-in-out.
interactions_and_motion.loading: Skeleton screens for dashboards. ASCII or minimalist geometric spinner for CAD loading/AI rendering.

images.description: A blueprint of a building with windows, to be used with a white/60 or black/60 overlay for text readability.
Wooden staircase under construction for features section showcasing structural integrity.
Architects desk with blueprint to indicate professional toolset.

3d_strategy.usage: Used strictly in the central canvas for rendering the 2D floorplan into 3D. Real-time rendering, crisp lighting (directional light to simulate sun, ambient light for base visibility).
3d_strategy.2d_canvas: HTML Canvas / Fabric.js / SVG for lightweight 2D drafting mode

testing.attributes: All interactive elements MUST use data-testid attributes (kebab-case, role-based, e.g., data-testid='draw-wall-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure all components use standard HTML/JS (.js files, NOT .tsx).
For the Editor layout, prevent body scrolling (overflow-hidden on main wrapper).
Use JetBrains Mono for all pricing, dimensions, and cost calculation displays.
Do not use transparent header backgrounds on the marketing site; use backdrop-blur-xl with a light tint.
Integrate Shadcn components carefully, stripping aggressive border-radii to match the Swiss Grid/Brutalist sharp design.
Leverage React Three Fiber exclusively for the 3D Viewer.
